name: State Bank Of Jeffers
description_short: Community bank in Jeffers, MN offering traditional banking services with FDIC insurance protection and online banking through PCS Banking.
description_long:
State Bank of Jeffers is a community bank located in Jeffers, Minnesota, serving the local area with traditional banking services. The bank has been established as a local financial institution with a small, dedicated team of banking professionals including a President, Vice President, Cashier, and support staff. Their leadership includes Cody Duroe as President and Wayne Maras as Vice President, with additional support from tellers and administrative staff.

The bank offers standard banking services typical of community banks, including checking and savings accounts with FDIC insurance protection up to applicable limits. They provide online banking access through PCS Banking, their hosting partner, allowing customers to manage accounts remotely. The bank also offers check reordering services and maintains traditional in-person banking hours Monday through Thursday from 8:30 AM to 3:00 PM, and Friday from 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM. Additionally, the bank employs an insurance agent (Jackie Mau) on staff, suggesting they may offer insurance products or services.

State Bank of Jeffers emphasizes security and consumer protection, with explicit messaging about online transaction safety and fraud prevention. They reference FDIC coverage tools and direct customers to FTC resources for protecting against online fraud and securing personal information. The bank maintains formal compliance documentation including Privacy Policy and Community Reinvestment Act Performance Evaluation, indicating adherence to federal banking regulations and community lending standards.

As a small community bank, State Bank of Jeffers is best suited for local customers seeking personalized banking relationships and traditional banking services. However, the limited information available on their website suggests they operate as a basic community bank without specialized lending products, investment services, or comprehensive digital banking features. Prospective customers should contact them directly to understand their full range of services, lending products, and whether they meet specific financial needs. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with FDIC insurance protection
Savings accounts with FDIC insurance protection
Online banking access via PCS Banking platform
Check cashing services (implied by check reordering)
Insurance products and services (insurance agent on staff)
Wire transfers and money movement (standard banking)
pros: FDIC insurance protection available on deposit accounts
Online banking access through PCS Banking partner for remote account management
Small community bank with personalized local service and known staff
Extended Friday hours (8:30 AM - 4:30 PM) providing longer weekly access
On-site insurance agent available for insurance product needs
Emphasis on online security with consumer fraud protection resources
Formal Privacy Policy and CRA Performance Evaluation on file
cons: Limited business hours (closes at 3:00 PM Monday-Thursday) restricting after-work access
Minimal information about specific banking products, rates, or loan offerings on website
Small bank may lack sophisticated digital banking features or mobile app details
No information about minimum balance requirements, fees, or product specifics
Limited service hours may not accommodate customers with inflexible schedules
best_for: Local Jeffers, MN residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and traditional banking services
Small business owners in the local area needing community bank connections
Individuals who value in-person banking relationships over digital-only options
diagnosis: State Bank of Jeffers is best for local Jeffers, MN residents seeking traditional community banking with FDIC-insured deposits and personalized service. The main caveat is that their website provides minimal detail about specific products, rates, loan offerings, or fees—prospective customers must contact them directly at (507) 628-5533 to understand their full service range and suitability for specific financial needs.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
